proof_boundary: Theorem-obligation decomposition only; this is not a proof of PF-infinity, Jensen hyperbolicity, Laguerre-Polya membership, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

obligations.claim: For each fixed degree d and shift n, finite PF-infinity of B^{d,n,0}_0,...,B^{d,n,0}_d is the Toeplitz-total-positivity form of the real-nonpositive-root condition for the Jensen window polynomial.
obligations.needed_upgrade: No upgrade for the finite equivalence; the missing part is proving it for every d and n for the actual zeta heat-flow coefficients.
obligations.proof_boundary: Exact reformulation only; it does not prove any window is PF-infinity.

obligations.claim: At degree d=2, the Jensen discriminant reduces to A_{n+1}^2 - A_n A_{n+2} >= 0, the m=1 signed-Hankel condition.
obligations.needed_upgrade: A theorem controlling all higher-degree Jensen-window Toeplitz minors, not only the quadratic contact.
obligations.proof_boundary: Low-degree exact contact only; not the all-degree Jensen-window PF bridge.

obligations.claim: For degrees d=3 and d=4, Jensen-window PF introduces additional banded Toeplitz obligations not supplied by the degree-2 signed-Hankel identity.
obligations.needed_upgrade: Identify a total-positivity or Xi/Phi-specific mechanism that supplies those higher Toeplitz minors uniformly in d and n.
obligations.proof_boundary: Exact theorem-search obstruction and finite countermodel gate only.

obligations.claim: The current finite Arb/Sturm/PF manifests validate selected degree-3/4 Toeplitz obligations, degree-3/4/5 root counts, and 315 finite window-by-window PF consequences.
obligations.needed_upgrade: All degrees, all shifts, and all Toeplitz minors, with no finite-prefix promotion.
obligations.proof_boundary: Finite evidence only; not all-minor Jensen-window PF-infinity as an infinite theorem.

obligations.claim: Prove all-order shifted reshaped-Hankel sign consistency for the actual A_k(0), not merely the current finite staircase.
obligations.needed_upgrade: A non-finite proof for every order, shift, and minor shape used by the bridge theorem.
obligations.proof_boundary: Open antecedent theorem; current Arb certificates are finite.

obligations.claim: Convert all-order shifted sign-regularity, plus legitimate Xi/Phi-specific analytic hypotheses, into total nonnegativity of every binomially weighted Jensen-window Toeplitz matrix.
obligations.needed_upgrade: A signed or indefinite total-positivity theorem whose hypotheses are checked for A_k(0) without assuming Jensen hyperbolicity or RH.
obligations.proof_boundary: Open bridge theorem; not currently proved.

obligations.claim: Any bridge theorem must handle the binomial weights binom(d,j) and all shifts n uniformly; controlling unweighted A_k or a finite shift rectangle is insufficient.
obligations.needed_upgrade: Uniform estimates or an exact structural transformation that preserves every required Jensen-window Toeplitz minor.
obligations.proof_boundary: Open uniformity requirement; finite window rectangles are rejected by countermodel gates.

obligations.claim: If all-degree/all-shift Jensen hyperbolicity at lambda=0 is established noncircularly, the remaining limiting step must place H_0 in the Laguerre-Polya class in the required normalization.
obligations.needed_upgrade: Document the limiting theorem and all normal-family/growth hypotheses used for this specific heat-flow normalization.
obligations.proof_boundary: Conditional downstream obligation; it cannot be invoked before the all-degree Jensen theorem is proved.

obligations.claim: Finite Jensen-window PF/Sturm rectangles cannot be promoted to all-shift Jensen hyperbolicity by wording alone.
obligations.needed_upgrade: Replace finite-prefix promotion with an all-order theorem.
obligations.proof_boundary: Rejected proof move; executable countermodel gate validates the rejection.

obligations.claim: Finite or all-order PF evidence for c_k=A_k/k! is a separate coefficient route and does not by itself prove PF-infinity of every binomially weighted Jensen window.
obligations.needed_upgrade: Either prove the coefficient route all the way through its own theorem target, or give a separate theorem transferring it to all Jensen windows.
obligations.proof_boundary: Route-separation guard only; not a rejection of the coefficient-PF programme.

invariants: At least three obligations remain open_obligation.
No finite_evidence, exact_equivalence, exact_contact, algebraic_obstruction, rejection_test, or route_separation row may set would_close_target=true.
Any row with would_close_target=true must have status open_obligation.
Every row has refs, needed_upgrade, and proof_boundary fields.
The finite evidence row is explicitly not all-minor Jensen-window PF-infinity.
